ocr_findings.description: The '● その他の法律' section header bullet is captured as plain text. The lower two-thirds of the page is intentionally blank (no text content in image). OCR correctly produces no spurious text for the blank area.

reviewer_notes: Page contains a two-row table (資金決済法, 金融商品取引法) with explanations, a 試験にはコレが出る！ summary box with three bullet points, and then a large blank area (p.81). OCR table formatting is correct with both rows captured. The exam-tip box text is accurately reproduced. Large blank area is not a problem. Label confirmed as content.
